ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial asset */,
  "series_code" TEXT /* Series code for the financial asset */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the original data source */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the finance company */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_assets_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES financial_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_assets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES asset_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_assets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES asset_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset value */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial asset */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quarter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_values_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_values_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_values_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES financial_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quarter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quarter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the finance company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES financial_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial asset being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES financial_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial asset related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES financial_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data included in the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
